transcription.text: Why won't you lay me down to a dead and buried On the edge of a knife, stayin' drunk in a lie The angels up in the clouds Are jealous knowin' we found something so wild We'll be ordinary You got me kissin' the ground We'll be sanctuary Shout at me when you're done Oh Lord, return me to dust The angels up in the clouds Are jealous knowin' we found
